content.en:
"That's ......"

Ye Tian's expression moved, and his eyes were full of shock.

And Gu Feng Dao Ancestor no longer stared at Ye Tian, but stared at the crack, full of endless greed.

"Forbidden Mother Stone, oh my God, such a Forbidden Dao Stone vein actually gave birth to a Forbidden Mother Stone!"

Gu Feng Dao Ancestor couldn't help but exclaim.

Ye Tian also has a little understanding of the Forbidden Mother Stone, after all, during this time, he also tried to understand some forbidden strange things and forbidden treasures as much as possible, and also tried to understand all kinds of secrets.

Especially after becoming the Heavenly General of Black Wind Mountain, his authority has increased a lot, and he has also learned many secrets from the various libraries of Black Wind Mountain, including the record of the Forbidden Mother Stone.

The forbidden mother stone was born in the forbidden Dao stone vein, but this possibility is very low, it does not mean that a large taboo Dao stone vein will give birth to a forbidden mother stone, and a small taboo Dao stone vein cannot give birth to a forbidden mother stone.

In fact, the birth of the forbidden mother stone has nothing to do with the size of the forbidden stone vein, it is a treasure born with a very small probability, and it is also a kind of forbidden treasure, and it is a medium forbidden treasure.

The Forbidden Mother Stone can be called a universal treasure, it can allow Dao Ancestors to have the power of darkness and taboos, can repair origin injuries, can refine the physique, refine the power of Dao Ancestors, and can also be used to create forbidden weapons.

More importantly, it was able to help the Supreme Dao Ancestor impact the invincible Dao Ancestor's combat power.

The strongest Dao Ancestor has mastered the power of the dark and forbidden and basically mastered the path of the strongest, and the biggest difference between the Invincible Dao Ancestor and the Supreme Dao Ancestor is that they have come to the end of a path, so they can be called invincible.

For example, if Ye Tian brought the Endless Dao to the end, he would attract a qualitative change, and thus step into the realm of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, if he did not bring a path to the end, and relied on other aspects to contend with the Invincible Dao Ancestor, he would still not be an invincible Dao Ancestor, but could only be regarded as a supreme Dao Ancestor comparable to the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

Of course, if the forbidden path is mastered, it will be different, and this provision will be invalidated, because the forbidden path is above the other avenues and is a special case.

The greatest effect of the Forbidden Mother Stone is to raise the origin of a Great Dao to the limit, allowing a Supreme Dao Ancestor to completely cultivate a Great Dao to the end, thus stepping into the invincible Dao Ancestor's combat power.

It is the hope of every supreme Dao ancestor.

But for the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it was also hope.

"If I get the Forbidden Mother Stone, I can not only step into the Supreme Dao Ancestor realm, but also impact the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm!"

Gu Feng Dao Ancestor went crazy and rushed down as fast as he could.

The other Dao Ancestors were not slow to react at all, and they also rushed down, trying to snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone.

Ye Tian is not slow at all, he also needs the Forbidden Mother Stone, who doesn't need such a treasure?

It's a complete mess!

Black Wind Mountain.

The Wind King and the Fire King had been paying attention to the news of the Forbidden Mountain Range, and when they learned that the Forbidden Mother Stone was born, they immediately couldn't help it.

"Fire King, I'm ready to be forcibly born, although I don't know how big that forbidden mother stone is, but it's definitely enough for me to use!"

The Wind King spoke.

"Wind King, be careful, this time I'm afraid that more than one of you will make a move, I'll help you too, if the forbidden mother stone is small, you can use it alone, and first break through to the realm of the invincible Dao Ancestor. If it's big enough, give me another one!" the Fire King began.

"Thank you very much!"

The Wind King said with a smile.

In the turbulence of time and space, a sealed place.

This place is not under the jurisdiction of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm Origin, as long as it does not leave the sealed place, it will not be suppressed by the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and at this moment, a man wearing an ancient battle robe and a golden mask walked out of the ancient sarcophagus.

On his robes there is an ancient forbidden text - wind!

This represents his identity - the Wind King!

This is his essence!

Crash!

The Wind King walked out of his sealed sleeping place, stepped into the turbulence of time and space, and stepped into the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, heading towards the Forbidden Mountain Range.

Along the way, the rule blades of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm attacked and suppressed him, and countless rule chains restrained him, causing his strength to continue to decline.

"I can only exert the strength of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it's enough!"

The Wind King said with a frown.

On the other side, the Fire King also walked out of his sealed sleeping place and joined the Wind King.

Not only did the Supreme True Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain dispatch, but the Supreme Dao Ancestors of the other Eight Heavens and Nine Heavens forces also dispatched one after another.

For example, one of the strongest Dao Ancestors of the Zixia Sect - Pure Yang Dao Ancestor!

The Heavenly Sword Sect's strongest Dao Ancestor - Secret Sword Dao Ancestor, Ten Thousand Sword Dao Ancestor!

The strongest Dao Ancestor of King Kong City - Blood Gang Dao Ancestor, Ten Killing Dao Ancestor!

The strongest Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Gate - Breaking the Sky Dao Ancestor and Cutting the Silver Dao Ancestor!

The supreme Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect - Shenhai Dao Ancestor, Mi Immortal Dao Ancestor and Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Weapon Dao Ancestor, Tianqi Dao Ancestor and Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, Void Mi Dao Ancestor, Cloud Mist Dao Ancestor and Heaven Swallowing Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect.

......

One by one, the strongest Dao Ancestors above the Eight Heavenly Forces descended on the Forbidden Mountain Range at the fastest speed, and their goal was very clear, just to snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone.

It can be seen that the forbidden mother stone is of great help to them.

In the depths of the turbulence of time and space, the Palace of the Emperor of Heaven.

Emperor Guangling also knew the news of the Forbidden Mother Stone, after all, he had been in charge of this matter, and he had also sent many True Ancestors to various places in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, only responsible for inquiring about the news, not responsible for competing for opportunities.

This time, the news of the forbidden mother stone was conveyed below, which shocked him.

Although he has been committed to causing disputes among the major forces, striving to let the Supreme Dao Ancestors participate in the war, and it is best to let a few Supreme Dao Ancestors fall, the Forbidden Mother Stone still made his heart move.

"Forbidden Mother Stone, although I have reached the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm, if I get the Forbidden Mother Stone, I can even cultivate the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, if I dedicate it to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, I can even exchange it for some treasures that will help me break through to the half-step Domain Ancestor level!"

Emperor Guangling was moved.

However, the three palace masters have an order that they cannot participate in the competition for treasures at present, and the last time was already an exception, after all, no one knows, but this time so many Dao Ancestors appeared, and their Heavenly Emperor Palace could not be exposed.

"It's a pity!"

Guangling Emperor Dao.

For the Forbidden Mother Stone, he could still bear it, after all, he was an invincible Dao Ancestor, and the Forbidden Mother Stone was useless to him, but so many powerful Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace couldn't help it one by one, and they all wanted to rush out of the Heavenly Emperor Palace to snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone.

Just as several Supreme Dao Ancestors were about to rush out, a phantom shadow pressed horizontally above the Heavenly Emperor Palace, suppressing those Supreme Dao Ancestors.

"Meet the Blue Dragon Palace Master!"

Many supreme Dao ancestors bowed one after another.

At the peak of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, there were six palace masters, including Qinglong, Xuanwu, White Tiger, Vermilion Bird, Zhenwu, and Qitian, but it was a pity that the domain boundary was shattered and three palace masters fell, leaving only three palace masters.

And the Qinglong Palace Lord is undoubtedly the most powerful palace master, and his strength is still above the True Martial Palace Master, and he rarely appears in normal times, but this time he appeared.

"All Dao Ancestors are not allowed to leave the Heavenly Emperor Palace. Although the forbidden mother stone is precious, once the forbidden world is born, there are more precious treasures than the forbidden mother stone. This is a prosperous era, and everyone is expected to be invincible in the Dao Ancestor realm, but if you dare to destroy the plan, even if you get the Forbidden Mother Stone, you will have to die!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said coldly.

Wisps of killing intent seemed to be hanging above the heads of the Supreme Dao Ancestors, making them terrified, and they lowered their heads one by one, and said, "Yes!"

No one is not afraid of the Qinglong Palace Lord, compared to the gentle Zhenwu Palace Lord, the Qinglong Palace Lord is killed, I don't know how many Dao Ancestors he killed, and he once killed a half-step domain ancestor who opposed the Heavenly Emperor Palace, shocking the vast sea realm for countless years.

If someone dared to disobey his orders, he would really kill the other party, even if that person was an emperor of the Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

With the appearance of the Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace, it represented that the Heavenly Emperor Palace had completely withdrawn from the stage of competing for the Forbidden Mother Stone.

The other side.

The Supreme Dao Ancestors had already rushed to the Forbidden Dao Stone Vein in the Forbidden Mountain Range.

The first Supreme Dao Ancestor to descend was the Void Mi Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect, his speed was unrivaled in the world, crushing other Supreme Dao Ancestors, and he could almost instantly reach any place in the Xuan Xuan Ancient Realm.

Therefore, he was the first to arrive!

"Get out of here!"

The Void Mi Dao Ancestor roared.

A Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor blocked his path, and with a single blow, he pierced through the opponent's body, sending it flying and completely injuring the opponent.

And several other Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were all shaken away by him, and they couldn't resist him at all.

The power of the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor is terrifying!
